introduce.title: What Is the AI Hairstyle Changer?
introduce.label: Introduction
introduce.description: AI Barber is a free AI hairstyle changer and virtual haircut simulator that lets you test cuts, lengths, and colors on your own photo before visiting a barber or salon.

items.title: Virtual Hairstyle Try-On
items.description: Try short, medium, and long styles like bobs, pixies, fades, buzz cuts, and long layers in seconds.

items.title: Realistic AI Results
items.description: Face-aware AI blends hairline and lighting for a natural-looking hairstyle preview.

items.title: Hair Color Changer
items.description: Preview black, brown, blonde, copper, silver, pink, or blue hair colors before you commit.

items.title: Style Transfer
items.description: Use custom prompts to recreate celebrity, K-pop, or runway-inspired looks.

benefits.title: Why Choose Our AI Hairstyle Changer
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Fast, private, and realistic previews for confident haircut and color decisions.

items.description: Generate multiple looks from one photo in seconds, 100% online.

items.description: Download salon-ready previews to communicate the exact cut and color you want.

usage.title: How to Use AI Hairstyle Changer
usage.description: Get a realistic hairstyle preview in four steps:

items.title: Upload a Clear Photo
items.description: Use a front-facing photo with good lighting so the AI can map your hairline accurately.

items.title: Choose a Hairstyle
items.description: Pick a style or category and decide on a short, medium, or long look.

items.title: Add Style Details
items.description: Describe length, texture, color, bangs, or fade to personalize the result.

items.title: Generate and Compare
items.description: Generate, download, and compare results side by side before you decide.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: FAQs about the AI hairstyle changer, photo tips, and how to get the best results.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: Is this AI Hairstyle Changer free to use?
items.answer: Yes. You can try the AI hairstyle changer online free with a trial to preview multiple styles.

items.question: How realistic are the hairstyles?
items.answer: The AI blends each hairstyle with your photo for a realistic preview of cut, length, and color.

items.question: What kind of photos work best?
items.answer: For the best results, upload a clear, front-facing photo with good lighting. Avoid photos where your face is covered by sunglasses, masks, or excessive hair. A neutral expression works best.

items.question: Can I change hair color only?
items.answer: Yes. Try color-only changes or combine a haircut and color, then share the result with your salon.

items.question: Does it work for men and women?
items.answer: Yes. There are 500+ styles: Men's 197, Women's 240, Boys' 56, Girls' 85.

items.question: Is my photo data secure?
items.answer: We take privacy seriously. Your uploaded photos are processed securely for the generation purpose and are not stored permanently or shared with third parties.

items.question: Can I show my AI hairstyle to a local barber or salon near me?
items.answer: Yes. Download your hairstyle preview and show it to your barber or stylist to get the exact look.

items.question: How long does it take to generate a hairstyle?
items.answer: Most previews are ready in seconds, depending on image size and traffic.

items.question: Can I try different hair lengths like short, medium, or long?
items.answer: Yes. Choose a template or describe the length you want in the prompt.

items.question: Will it work with curly or textured hair?
items.answer: Yes. Try curls, waves, or afro textures; clearer photos give better results.

items.question: Do I need to install anything?
items.answer: No. The AI hairstyle changer runs in your browser—no downloads needed.

photoGuidelines.title: Photo Guidelines for Best Results
photoGuidelines.suitableDescription: Please upload a clear, front-facing photo of your face. To create a satisfying look, it's ideal to pull your hair up or back. And let your hair hang naturally.
photoGuidelines.unsuitableDescription: Please don't upload photos taken from the side, in low light, where your face is covered by hair or any other objects. Also, please avoid cartoon images.
